name: Nuclear Apocalypse: Radioactive world
description:
The year is 2100, and the Earth as we once knew it is gone. A cascade of nuclear meltdowns in 2025 reshaped the planet into a shattered, radioactive wasteland. Cities lie in ruins, forests glow faintly under the veil of fallout, and once-bustling nations are now shadowy remnants of their former selves. Humanity clings to survival in fortified bunkers and isolated clean zones, while vast stretches of the planet—known as the Wild Zones—have been reclaimed by mutated wildlife and a new, hostile ecosystem.

This is a world where survival is a daily struggle. The air is heavy with radiation, and the land brims with danger—from aggressive, mutated predators to “zombie-like” creatures ravaged by radiation-induced neural decay. Yet life persists. In the absence of human dominance, nature has adapted in strange and extraordinary ways. Forests grow unchecked, glowing fungi thrive in the darkness, and wolves, bears, and even birds roam as apex predators, often twisted into forms both terrifying and awe-inspiring.

But humanity isn’t finished yet. Across the globe, survivors have built new societies, governed by the hardened leaders who emerged from the chaos. The United States operates from underground military bunkers, its people ruled under martial law. The People’s Republic of the Underground in China clings to order through military might. Meanwhile, nations like Brazil, Australia, and the Nordic Confederation are rising powers, leveraging their relative isolation and natural resources to rebuild.

In this fractured world, alliances are fragile, resources are scarce, and every choice could mean life or death. Will you venture into the dangerous Wild Zones to reclaim lost technology and territory? Will you unite the scattered remnants of humanity, or carve out your own dominion in the chaos?

This is not just a story of survival—it’s a story of rebuilding, adapting, and redefining what it means to thrive in a world forever changed. Welcome to the Fallout World, where danger and opportunity lurk in equal measure. What will you make of it?
creator: Qeratokalori
